harm.description: unauthorized access to sensitive customer data and proprietary Google code, exposing critical infrastructure and intellectual property.

parsed_output.description: Security researchers discovered that Google Cloud's Vertex AI Agent Engine had excessive default permissions, allowing attackers to hijack AI agents as 'double agents.' This enabled unauthorized access to sensitive customer data and proprietary Google code, exposing critical infrastructure and intellectual property. Google has since updated its documentation and issued mitigation guidance.

event.description: Google Cloud Vertex AI Agent Engine had excessive default permissions allowing attackers to hijack AI agents, access sensitive customer data and proprietary Google code
